# Ciel — Japanese Hair Studio by Aki

> A Japanese hair salon in Phrom Phong, Sukhumvit, Bangkok, Thailand. Japanese, English and Thai spoken. Known for high-tone colour, highlights, balayage, Japanese straight perm, keratin treatment and Japanese head spa. 5.0 rated.

## About
Ciel is led by Aki, a Japanese stylist and colourist based in Bangkok with experience in Japan, Australia and Dubai. The salon offers a calm, comfortable space and tailored cuts, colour and treatments for all hair types, including both Asian and Western hair. Careful counselling in the guest's own language.

## Location & contact
- Address: Ariston Hotel 2F, 19 Soi Sukhumvit 24, Khlong Tan, Khlong Toei, Bangkok 10110, Thailand
- Nearest station: ~100 m (about a 2-minute walk) from BTS Phrom Phong; next to Emporium, EmQuartier and Benjasiri Park, on Soi 24 by the Hilton
- Phone: +66 92 692 3578
- Email: ciel.hair@icloud.com
- LINE: @ciel.hair
- WhatsApp: +66 92 692 3578
- Instagram: @ciel_japanese_hair_bangkok
- Opening hours: 10:00–19:00; closed Wednesdays (and the 1st & 3rd Tuesday of the month; Tuesday closures may vary)
- Languages spoken: Japanese, English, Thai

## Services (starting prices)
- Hair Cut: from THB 1,000 (men) / THB 1,200 (ladies)
- Design Colour, highlights, balayage, high-tone colour: from THB 2,500
- Japanese straight perm (rebonding): from THB 3,990
- Kerasilk keratin treatment: from THB 3,990
- Japanese head spa: from THB 2,000 (60 min); premium with TOKIO 4-step treatment from THB 3,000 (90 min)
- First-time packages available (cut + colour + TOKIO etc.)
- Prices vary by hair length, thickness and volume and are confirmed in salon.

## Booking
- Online via Fresha: https://www.fresha.com/a/ciel-japanese-hair-studio-by-aki-khlong-toei-19-soi-sukhumvit-24-yyuld3cq
- Or contact via LINE, WhatsApp or phone.
